messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Framework: FastAPI, Styling: Tailwind CSS

Original request: create hello world app, where i can modify the text "hello world" colors, through a frontend ui
Clarifications:
- framework: FastAPI
- styling: Tailwind CSS
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Framework: FastAPI, Styling: Tailwind CSS\n\nOriginal request: create hello world app, where i can modify the text \"hello world\" colors, through a frontend ui\nClarifications:\n- framework: FastAPI\n- styling: Tailwind CSS\nPrevious validation issues:\nNone",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "project-initialization",
      "title": "Initialize project repository and environment",
      "description": "Create project directory, initialize git, set up Python virtual environment, and create package files (pyproject/requirements) plus a simple npm package.json for frontend tooling.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Repository initialized with a virtualenv, requirements or pyproject.toml, package.json for frontend, and an initial README; git repo created and commit made."
    },
    {
      "id": "backend-fastapi-setup",
      "title": "Set up FastAPI backend skeleton",
      "description": "Install FastAPI and Uvicorn, create main application file (main.py) with app instance and a basic /health route; configure static files mounting placeholder for frontend assets.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "project-initialization"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "FastAPI app file exists, uvicorn can start the app, and the /health endpoint returns HTTP 200."
    },
    {
      "id": "frontend-tailwind-setup",
      "title": "Initialize frontend with Tailwind CSS",
      "description": "Set up frontend directory, install Tailwind CSS and required npm tooling, add base HTML entry that includes compiled Tailwind output and a placeholder for the hello world text.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "project-initialization"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Frontend directory contains package.json, Tailwind config, a source stylesheet using Tailwind directives, and a build script that produces a compiled CSS file."
    },
    {
      "id": "api-endpoint-for-color",
      "title": "Implement API endpoints to get and set text color",
      "description": "Add REST endpoints to FastAPI to GET the current color and POST/PUT a new color value (JSON). Validate color input (e.g., hex or CSS color name) and return success/failure responses.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "backend-fastapi-setup"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "GET /api/color returns a valid color JSON, POST /api/color accepts valid color payloads and responds with 200, and invalid inputs return 400."
    },
    {
      "id": "frontend-ui-implementation",
      "title": "Implement frontend UI to change and preview color",
      "description": "Create UI with a color input (color picker and/or text input), Hello World text element styled via Tailwind classes and inline style, and JavaScript that updates the text color in real time and calls the API to persist changes.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "frontend-tailwind-setup",
        "api-endpoint-for-color"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "User can change the color using the UI and see the Hello World text update immediately; the UI makes successful API calls to save/retrieve the color (200 responses)."
    },
    {
      "id": "serve-frontend-from-backend",
      "title": "Build frontend assets and serve them via FastAPI",
      "description": "Add build step to produce final CSS/JS, place compiled assets into the backend static directory, and configure FastAPI to serve the frontend index.html at root.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "frontend-ui-implementation",
        "backend-fastapi-setup"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Visiting http://localhost:8000/ serves the frontend index page, static CSS/JS load, and the UI can interact with the API when served through FastAPI."
    },
    {
      "id": "testing-and-run-instructions",
      "title": "Test behavior and document run instructions",
      "description": "Manually test the full flow (start server, open UI, change color, reload to confirm persisted color), add brief README instructions for starting backend and building frontend, and include troubleshooting notes.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "serve-frontend-from-backend"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README contains clear start/build commands, manual test checklist passes (UI updates color, API persists/returns color), and any issues are documented."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down: start with project initialization, then create backend and frontend foundations in parallel, implement API and UI, integrate by serving built frontend from FastAPI, and finish with testing and documentation."
}
